scripts.api:dev: cd services/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.api:migrate: cd services/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.api:seed: cd services/api && uv run python -m app.scripts.seed
scripts.api:pseo: cd services/api && uv run python -m app.scripts.generate_pseo
